label: Ritual outcome comp (single quality offset)
description: Abstract intermediate comp that applies qualityOffset directly when a binary condition is met. Not used directly as a Class value; use concrete subclasses.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Quality offset applied when the condition of this comp is met.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve used by some subclasses to scale the quality offset by a runtime value.
